scripts.dev: cross-env PORTLESS_HTTPS=0 PORTLESS_PORT=1355 portless run --name mimi vite
scripts.dev:new-work: cross-env MIMIMILLI_MOCK_SCENARIO=new-work PORTLESS_HTTPS=0 PORTLESS_PORT=1355 portless run --name mimi vite
scripts.dev:empty: cross-env MIMIMILLI_MOCK_SCENARIO=empty PORTLESS_HTTPS=0 PORTLESS_PORT=1355 portless run --name mimi vite
scripts.dev:errors: cross-env MIMIMILLI_MOCK_SCENARIO=errors PORTLESS_HTTPS=0 PORTLESS_PORT=1355 portless run --name mimi vite
scripts.dev:real: cross-env BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:8080 PORTLESS_HTTPS=0 PORTLESS_PORT=1355 portless run --name mimi vite
